shows.name: A Niche
shows.desc: Talking about a different thing every week and related music.

shows.name: bam wham thank you ma'am
shows.desc: This show has no description; I am once again descending into madness and everyone is forced along for the ride. However, I promise I’ll try to play good music and have some wacky stories :)

shows.name: Pink Flamingos
shows.desc: A show to highlight LGBTQ artists, especially in experimental, electronic or hyperpop

shows.name: Sam's show
shows.desc: 45 minutes with the latest and certainly not the “greatest”, Sam, with the music that gets you moving and grooving through the semester.

shows.name: The Drummarts Show
shows.desc: A discussion and analysis of film and related media be that books, comics or music. The discussion of related media can be as its own work of art or as it pertains to film.

shows.name: The Campfire
shows.desc: Show where topics of horror and the supernatural are discussed, as well as some spooky music.
